query: Generate a single-file HTML landing page for an AI automation workspace. Use a dark but not pure black palette, strong creative interaction, magnetic buttons, text scramble moments, and fully implement a modal, FAQ accordion, toast notifications, tabs, animated counters, responsive navigation, and accessibility states.
expanded_queries: What dark-themed visual styles, magnetic button effects, text scramble animations, and creative interaction techniques are recommended for AI workspace landing pages?
How should interactive components like modals, FAQ accordions, toast notifications, tabs, animated counters, and responsive navigation behave with state changes and user feedback?
What hard constraints must be satisfied: single HTML file, accessibility compliance (ARIA, keyboard navigation, contrast ratios), browser compatibility, and no external dependencies?

What is the optimal generation flow and page structure to integrate all required components—header, hero, features, testimonials, FAQ, CTA, footer—while maintaining semantic HTML and logical DOM order?

Generate a single-file HTML landing page for an AI automation workspace. Use a dark but not pure black palette, strong creative interaction, magnetic buttons, text scramble moments, and fully implement a modal, FAQ accordion, toast notifications, tabs, animated counters, responsive navigation, and accessibility states.
retrieved_chunks: [techniques] T-29 旋转词语标题（Rotating Word Hero）
[flow] Step 3：生成 Round 1 Prompt（整体框架）
[techniques] T-36 文字模糊聚焦入场（Text Blur Focus Reveal）
[techniques] T-39 环境光标跟随光晕（Ambient Cursor Glow）
[flow] 强制步骤 0：读取获奖作品创意技法
[techniques] T-13 模糊/虚化过渡区（Section Blur Transition）
[style] # W码 / P风格 / 页面架构 速查库
